_observed: REGRESSION FIXTURE (the production bug). eBay getItem localizedAspects for item 117223259644 — the JAPANESE Neo Genesis Typhlosion that the English Typhlosion page (neo1-17) wrongly surfaced + redirected to on 2026-06-06.
